purpose: Controlled Minecraft task streams for transfer-memory and reusable-skill promotion gates before runtime defaults.

streams.description: Wood gathering should transfer into table and pickaxe crafting without turning raw episode recall into an unverified default.

tasks.goal: Collect 6 oak logs from nearby trees.
tasks.reuse_evidence: memory_write oak_log planks wood_source lesson for later crafting

tasks.goal: Craft a crafting table from collected oak logs.
tasks.reuse_evidence: memory_read reused oak_log planks conversion before crafting_table

tasks.goal: Craft a stone pickaxe after collecting cobblestone.
tasks.reuse_evidence: skill_match used crafting_table planks workbench prerequisite for stone_pickaxe

streams.description: Basic shelter construction should transfer into safer night preparation while preserving verifier-facing postconditions.

tasks.goal: Find and mark a flat safe shelter site near spawn.
tasks.reuse_evidence: memory_write safe_site spawn_anchor flat_ground shelter location

tasks.goal: Build a simple enclosed shelter before night.
tasks.reuse_evidence: plan reused safe_site flat_ground notes to place wall_loop and doorway

tasks.goal: Add lighting and a safe entrance to the shelter.
tasks.reuse_evidence: memory_read enclosed_shelter doorway safe_site before torch and entrance placement

streams.description: Tool and route memories should transfer from surface stone to coal and iron without causing unsafe mining regressions.

tasks.reuse_evidence: memory_write cobblestone stone_tool_material surface_mine safe route

tasks.goal: Mine coal and craft torches for a cave run.
tasks.reuse_evidence: skill_match used cobblestone stone_tool_material pickaxe path before coal torch crafting

tasks.goal: Mine iron ore while maintaining a safe lit route.
tasks.reuse_evidence: memory_read torch mining_light surface_mine route before raw_iron extraction

streams.description: Exploration route memory should transfer into return-to-base and resource revisit tasks under distance pressure.

tasks.goal: Record a base landmark and nearby resource direction.
tasks.reuse_evidence: memory_write base_landmark resource_direction spawn_route navigation note

tasks.goal: Travel to the marked resource and return to base.
tasks.reuse_evidence: memory_read base_landmark resource_direction spawn_route before round_trip_route return_to_base

tasks.goal: Return to base after a hazard blocks the direct path.
tasks.reuse_evidence: plan reused round_trip_route return_to_base base_landmark while adding hazard_detour

streams.description: Small redstone experiments should only transfer when controlled application and held-out variants stay stable.

tasks.goal: Place a lever and observe a redstone-powered block change.
tasks.reuse_evidence: memory_write lever redstone_signal powered_block cause effect

tasks.goal: Build a redstone lamp toggle using a lever.
tasks.reuse_evidence: skill_match reused lever redstone_signal powered_block to make lamp_toggle

tasks.goal: Apply the same lever signal pattern to a door or trapdoor variant.
tasks.reuse_evidence: memory_read lamp_toggle redstone_signal lever before door_toggle_variant generalization
